title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb analyzes DeepSeek's V4 flagship model, emphasizing its dramatic reduction in inference compute and cost. The analysis frames V4 as evidence of a divergence in AI development strategies between open and closed labs, driven by different national economic incentives, and discusses emerging efficiency techniques in modern LLMs.
